questions.text: I ______ in Riyadh since 2020.
questions.explanationAr: كلمة since (منذ) دالة على المضارع التام: have/has + التصريف الثالث، لأن الفعل بدأ في الماضي ومستمر للآن.

questions.text: While she ______ dinner, the phone rang.
questions.explanationAr: while + حدث طويل مستمر في الماضي (was/were + ing) قاطعه حدث قصير بالماضي البسيط (rang).

questions.text: Yesterday, Ahmed ______ to the mall with his friends.
questions.explanationAr: Yesterday كلمة دالة على الماضي البسيط: went. أي حدث انتهى في وقت محدد بالماضي = ماضٍ بسيط.

questions.text: By the time we arrived, the movie ______ .
questions.explanationAr: حدثان في الماضي: الأسبق منهما يأخذ الماضي التام had + V3. الفيلم بدأ قبل وصولنا.

questions.text: Look! It ______ outside. Take your umbrella.
questions.explanationAr: Look! تدل على حدث يحصل الآن أمامك = مضارع مستمر is/are + ing.

questions.text: Sara ______ her homework yet, so she can't play.
questions.explanationAr: yet (حتى الآن) دالة على المضارع التام المنفي: hasn't + V3.

questions.text: Each of the students ______ a laptop for the project.
questions.explanationAr: Each تُعامل دائمًا مفردًا حتى لو جاء بعدها of + جمع، فالفعل يأخذ صيغة المفرد has. لا تنخدع بكلمة students!

questions.text: The news ______ very good today.
questions.explanationAr: news رغم أنها تنتهي بـ s فهي اسم غير معدود يُعامل مفردًا: The news is. مثلها: mathematics, physics.

questions.text: My brother and my sister ______ in Jeddah.
questions.explanationAr: فاعلان معطوفان بـ and = جمع، فالفعل بدون s: live.

questions.text: Everyone in the class ______ English well.
questions.explanationAr: Everyone / everybody / nobody / each كلها تعامل مفردًا: speaks بالـ s.

questions.text: The final exam is ______ Sunday morning.
questions.explanationAr: on مع أيام الأسبوع والتواريخ: on Sunday, on May 5. (in للشهور والسنوات، at للساعات).

questions.text: She is very interested ______ learning French.
questions.explanationAr: تعبير ثابت يجب حفظه: interested in. ولاحظ بعده الفعل بـ ing لأنه بعد حرف جر.

questions.text: We arrived ______ the airport two hours early.
questions.explanationAr: arrive at + مكان محدد (مطار، محطة)، وarrive in + مدينة أو دولة. لا نقول أبدًا arrive to.

questions.text: My little brother was born ______ 2015.
questions.explanationAr: in مع السنوات والشهور: in 2015, in March.

questions.text: My uncle is ______ honest man who never lies.
questions.explanationAr: an قبل الصوت المتحرك — honest تبدأ بحرف h صامت فننطقها (أونست)، لذلك تأخذ an. العبرة بالنطق لا بالحرف المكتوب.

questions.text: She studies at ______ university in Dammam.
questions.explanationAr: a university — لأن university تنطق بصوت (يو /ju:/) وهو صوت شبه ساكن، فتأخذ a وليس an. مثلها: a European country.

questions.text: ______ sun rises in the east every day.
questions.explanationAr: الأشياء الوحيدة في الكون تأخذ the دائمًا: the sun, the moon, the sky.

questions.text: If it rains tomorrow, we ______ at home.
questions.explanationAr: شرطية النوع الأول (احتمال حقيقي في المستقبل): If + مضارع بسيط ← will + مصدر.

questions.text: If I ______ rich, I would travel around the world.
questions.explanationAr: شرطية النوع الثاني (خيال في الحاضر): If + ماضٍ، والأفصح مع الضمائر كلها استخدام were: If I were rich.

questions.text: If she had studied harder, she ______ the exam.
questions.explanationAr: شرطية النوع الثالث (ندم على ماضٍ انتهى): If + had + V3 ← would have + V3.

questions.text: This mosque ______ more than 100 years ago.
questions.explanationAr: المسجد لا يبني نفسه = مبني للمجهول (be + V3)، وago تدل على الماضي: was built.

questions.text: English ______ all over the world.
questions.explanationAr: اللغة «تُتحدث» ولا تتحدث بنفسها = مبني للمجهول مضارع: is + spoken (V3).

questions.text: The report ______ by the manager tomorrow.
questions.explanationAr: وجود by + الفاعل إشارة قوية للمبني للمجهول، وtomorrow للمستقبل: will be + V3.

questions.text: The man ______ lives next door is a doctor.
questions.explanationAr: who للعاقل (الرجل). which لغير العاقل، where للأماكن، whose للملكية.

questions.text: This is the book ______ I told you about.
questions.explanationAr: that (أو which) لغير العاقل — book شيء غير عاقل.

questions.text: That is the school ______ I studied when I was young.
questions.explanationAr: where لأننا نتحدث عن مكان حدث فيه الفعل (درست فيه). لو قلنا which لاحتجنا حرف جر: in which.

questions.text: Riyadh is ______ than Abha in the summer.
questions.explanationAr: مقارنة بين مدينتين + وجود than = صيغة المقارنة. hot صفة قصيرة فنضيف er (مع مضاعفة t): hotter.

questions.text: That was ______ movie I have ever seen!
questions.explanationAr: ever + المقارنة بالجميع = صيغة التفضيل مع the. وgood شاذة: good → better → the best.

questions.text: My car is ______ expensive ______ yours.
questions.explanationAr: للتساوي بين شيئين: as + صفة + as = بنفس القدر. My car is as expensive as yours.

questions.text: You ______ wear a seatbelt. It's the law.
questions.explanationAr: must للإلزام القوي — والدليل «It's the law» (إنه القانون). can للقدرة وmight للاحتمال.

questions.text: My sister ______ speak three languages fluently.
questions.explanationAr: can للقدرة والمهارة. وتذكر: بعد الأفعال الناقصة يأتي الفعل مصدرًا مباشرة بدون to.

questions.text: You look very tired. You ______ get some rest.
questions.explanationAr: should للنصيحة — والسياق نصيحة لشخص متعب.

questions.text: I really enjoy ______ football on weekends.
questions.explanationAr: enjoy من الأفعال التي يتبعها الفعل بصيغة ing دائمًا. احفظ معها: finish, avoid, mind, keep, suggest.

questions.text: He decided ______ a new car next month.
questions.explanationAr: decide يتبعها to + مصدر. احفظ معها: want, hope, plan, agree, refuse.

questions.text: She is very good at ______ difficult problems.
questions.explanationAr: القاعدة الذهبية: بعد أي حرف جر (at, in, of, about) يأتي الفعل بـ ing دائمًا: good at solving.

questions.text: ______ he was very tired, he finished all his work.
questions.explanationAr: المعنى فيه تناقض (متعب ← ومع ذلك أنهى عمله) = Although + جملة كاملة.

questions.text: I stayed home yesterday ______ I was sick.
questions.explanationAr: المرض سبب البقاء في البيت = because + السبب.

questions.text: He studied very hard; ______, he did not pass the exam.
questions.explanationAr: تناقض بين الاجتهاد والرسوب = however (لكن/ومع ذلك)، وتأتي بعد فاصلة منقوطة وتليها فاصلة.

questions.text: She speaks English very ______ .
questions.explanationAr: الكلمة تصف الفعل speaks (كيف تتحدث؟) = نحتاج حالًا adverb ينتهي بـ ly: fluently.

questions.text: The ______ of the new airport took five years.
questions.explanationAr: بعد The وقبل of نحتاج اسمًا — واللاحقة -tion تصنع الأسماء: construction (البناء).

questions.text: The project was very ______ and made a big profit.
questions.explanationAr: بعد was very نحتاج صفة تصف المشروع — اللاحقة -ful تصنع الصفات: successful.

questions.text:
Choose the part that contains an error:
My friends (A) is coming (B) to the party (C) tomorrow evening (D).
questions.explanationAr: الفاعل friends جمع، فالصحيح are coming. دائمًا أول فحص: هل الفعل يوافق الفاعل؟

questions.text:
Choose the part that contains an error:
She went (A) to the market (B) for buying (C) some vegetables (D).
questions.explanationAr: للتعبير عن الغرض (لماذا ذهبت؟) نستخدم to + مصدر: went to the market to buy. «for buying» خطأ شائع عند العرب.

questions.text:
Choose the part that contains an error:
My brother is (A) more taller (B) than (C) all his friends (D).
questions.explanationAr: لا نجمع بين more وer أبدًا! إما taller (صفة قصيرة) أو more + صفة طويلة. الصحيح: taller than.

questions.text:
Choose the part that contains an error:
I have seen (A) that movie (B) last week (C) with my family (D).
questions.explanationAr: لا يجتمع المضارع التام مع وقت ماضٍ محدد (last week). الصحيح: I saw that movie last week.

questions.text: Which sentence is written correctly?

options.A: my friend khalid lives in riyadh.
options.B: My Friend khalid Lives In Riyadh.
options.C: My friend Khalid lives in Riyadh.
options.D: My friend khalid lives in Riyadh.

questions.explanationAr: الحرف الكبير: بداية الجملة (My) + أسماء الأعلام (Khalid) + المدن (Riyadh). الكلمات العادية (friend, lives) تبقى صغيرة.

questions.text: Which sentence uses punctuation correctly?

options.A: He was late however he finished the test.
options.B: He was late, however, he finished the test
options.C: He was late; however, he finished the test.
options.D: He was late however, he finished the test.

questions.explanationAr: however بين جملتين كاملتين تحتاج: فاصلة منقوطة قبلها + فاصلة بعدها: ; however,

questions.text: Which sentence is the best topic sentence to begin a paragraph?

options.A: This is why he decided to leave.
options.B: Regular exercise improves both physical and mental health.
options.C: For example, swimming burns many calories.

questions.explanationAr: الجملة الرئيسية تقدم فكرة عامة تصلح أن تتفرع عنها تفاصيل. لا تبدأ الفقرة بضمير غامض (This) ولا بمثال (For example) ولا بخاتمة (In conclusion).

questions.text:
Put the steps in the correct order:
1. Finally, pour the tea into a cup.
2. First, boil some water.
3. Then, add the tea leaves.
4. After that, let it sit for three minutes.
questions.explanationAr: تتبع كلمات التسلسل: First (اغلِ الماء) → Then (أضف الشاي) → After that (انتظر) → Finally (اسكب). كلمات الترتيب هي مفتاحك دائمًا.

questions.text:
Which sentence does NOT belong in this paragraph?
"Honey has many health benefits. (1) It soothes sore throats. (2) It gives the body quick energy. (3) Bees live in large groups called colonies. (4) It also helps heal small wounds."
questions.explanationAr: الفقرة عن فوائد العسل الصحية — جملة (3) عن حياة النحل الاجتماعية، معلومة صحيحة لكنها خارج موضوع الفقرة (تكسر وحدة الفقرة unity).

questions.text:
Choose the best way to combine:
"He was very sick." + "He went to school."

options.A: He was very sick, so he went to school.
options.B: Although he was very sick, he went to school.
options.C: He was very sick because he went to school.
options.D: He was very sick, he went to school.

questions.explanationAr: العلاقة بين الجملتين تناقض (مريض ← ومع ذلك ذهب) = Although. so تعني نتيجة منطقية وbecause سبب، وكلاهما يناقض المعنى.

questions.text: Choose the clearest and most concise sentence:

options.A: In my personal opinion, I think that the book is interesting.
options.B: The book, which is a book that I read, is interesting.
options.D: The book is a thing that has the quality of being interesting to me.

questions.explanationAr: أفضل جملة = أوضح معنى بأقل كلمات بلا تكرار. «In my opinion, I think» تكرار (الرأي = ما تظنه)، والخيارات الأخرى مليئة بالحشو.

questions.text: Which sentence is capitalized correctly?

options.A: We study english every monday in march.
options.B: We study English every Monday in March.
options.C: We Study English Every Monday In March.
options.D: We study English every monday in March.

questions.explanationAr: اللغات (English) والأيام (Monday) والشهور (March) تبدأ بحرف كبير دائمًا — أما بقية كلمات الجملة فلا تُكبَّر.

questions.text: What is the main idea of the passage?

options.A: Camels can drink 100 liters of water quickly.
options.B: Camel racing is a popular modern sport.
options.C: Camels have been, and still are, important in Arabian life.
options.D: Modern transport is better than camels.

questions.explanationAr: النص كله يدور حول أهمية الإبل قديمًا (النقل) وحديثًا (رمز التراث والسباقات). الفكرة الرئيسية تغطي النص كاملًا لا جزءًا منه.

questions.text: According to the passage, how much water can a camel drink in ten minutes?
questions.explanationAr: سؤال تفاصيل — الإجابة نص مكتوب: «drink up to 100 liters of water in just ten minutes». ابحث عن الرقم في النص بتقنية scanning.

questions.text: In the passage, the word "they" in "they carried travelers and goods" refers to:
questions.explanationAr: الضمير they يعود على أقرب اسم جمع منطقي قبله وهو camels — جرّب الاستبدال: «الجمال حملت المسافرين» يستقيم المعنى.

questions.text: The word "heritage" in the passage is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanationAr: السياق: «رمز فخر للـ heritage» بعد الحديث عن تاريخ الإبل الطويل — فالمعنى الأقرب هو التراث/الموروث الثقافي.

questions.text: What can be inferred from the passage?

options.A: Camels are no longer valuable in Saudi Arabia.
options.B: Some people are willing to pay very high prices for camels.
options.C: Camel racing is older than camel transport.

questions.explanationAr: النص يقول إن الجمل الفائز «يُباع بملايين الريالات» — نستنتج أن هناك من يدفع مبالغ ضخمة. الاستنتاج الصحيح عليه دليل نصي دائمًا.

questions.text: What is the passage mainly about?

options.A: Why phones are bad for teenagers.
options.B: The importance of sleep for students' learning.
options.C: How to score higher on exams.

questions.explanationAr: كل فقرات النص تخدم فكرة واحدة: قلة النوم تضر التركيز والتحصيل. الجوال والتجربة مجرد تفاصيل داعمة.

questions.text: How many hours of sleep do teenagers need according to the passage?
questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا: «teenagers need eight to ten hours of sleep every night».

questions.text: What can be inferred about studying all night before an exam?

options.A: It is the best way to prepare.
options.C: It may lower your exam score.

questions.explanationAr: التجربة في النص: من ناموا جيدًا «تفوقوا» على من سهروا — إذن السهر للمذاكرة قد يخفض درجتك. وهذه نصيحة حقيقية لك قبل ستيب!

questions.text: The word "delays" in the last sentence is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanationAr: السياق: الضوء الأزرق «delays» إشارات النوم — أي يؤخرها، ولهذا ينصحون بإبعاد الجوال. delay = يؤخر.

questions.text: What do experts recommend before bed?

options.C: Putting phones away an hour before sleeping

questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا في الجملة الأخيرة: «putting phones away at least one hour before bed».

questions.text: According to the story, where was coffee first discovered?
questions.explanationAr: النص: «coffee was first discovered in Ethiopia». اليمن كانت المحطة الثانية حيث أُعدّ كمشروب ساخن أول مرة.

questions.text: What is the best title for this passage?

options.B: The Journey of Coffee Through History

questions.explanationAr: العنوان الأفضل يلخص النص كله: رحلة القهوة من إثيوبيا لليمن للعالم حتى اليوم. بقية الخيارات تفاصيل جزئية.

questions.text: Why did people in Yemen first drink coffee?

options.B: To stay awake during long nights of prayer
options.C: To sell it in coffee houses

questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا: «to stay awake during long nights of prayer».

questions.text: The word "hospitality" is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanationAr: السياق: القهوة العربية «تُقدَّم للضيوف» كرمز للكرم والـ hospitality = حسن الضيافة واستقبال الضيوف.

questions.text: What can be inferred about coffee houses in the sixteenth century?

options.B: They were social places where people gathered.
options.C: They were found only in Ethiopia.

questions.explanationAr: النص يصفها بأنها «popular places to meet and talk» — نستنتج أنها كانت أماكن اجتماعية للتجمع.

questions.text: How many lines does the Riyadh Metro have?
questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا: «Its six lines cover 176 kilometers». الـ 85 هو عدد المحطات — انتبه لتشابه الأرقام.

questions.text: What is the main purpose of the passage?

options.A: To describe the Riyadh Metro project and its goals.
options.C: To explain how computers drive trains.

questions.explanationAr: النص يعرّف بالمشروع: حجمه، أهدافه (تخفيف الزحام والتلوث)، ومميزاته — وصف شامل للمشروع.

questions.text: What do city officials expect to happen in the future?

options.C: Fewer people will drive their cars daily.

questions.explanationAr: النص: المسؤولون يتوقعون أن «يترك مئات الآلاف سياراتهم» ويستخدموا المترو — أي انخفاض قيادة السيارات.

questions.text: The word "congestion" is closest in meaning to:
questions.explanationAr: السياق يساعدك: «traffic congestion on the city's crowded roads» — الطرق المزدحمة = الازدحام المروري.

questions.text: Who controls the metro trains?
questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا: «fully automatic and driverless, controlled by a central computer system».

questions.text: What is the main idea of the passage?

options.B: Bees are essential for producing much of our food.

questions.explanationAr: الفكرة الجامعة: أهمية النحل تتجاوز العسل — ثلث غذائنا يعتمد على تلقيحه للنباتات، وحمايته حماية لغذائنا.

questions.text: How much of human food depends on pollination?
questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا: «about one third of the food humans eat depends on this process».

questions.text: According to the passage, why are bee numbers falling?

options.B: Because of chemical pesticides and loss of wild flowers

questions.explanationAr: مكتوبة نصًا: «because of chemical pesticides and the loss of wild flowers».

questions.text: The word "They" in "They encourage people to plant flowers" refers to:
questions.explanationAr: جرّب الاستبدال: «الخبراء يشجعون الناس على زراعة الزهور» — المعنى يستقيم مع experts المذكورة في الجملة السابقة.

questions.text: What does the writer mean by "protecting bees is protecting our own food supply"?

options.B: If bees disappear, much of our food will too.

questions.explanationAr: استنتاج من مجمل النص: بما أن ثلث الغذاء يعتمد على تلقيح النحل، فاختفاؤه يهدد غذاءنا — لذا حمايته حماية لنا.

questions.text: This conversation most likely takes place …
questions.explanationAr: الحوار يدور حول طلب الطعام والخدمة (order / menu)، وهي مفردات تدل على مطعم. استنتج المكان من مجمل المفردات لا من كلمة واحدة.

questions.text: What kind of project is Osama working on?
questions.explanationAr: ذكر أسامة أنه يعمل على مشروع في التاريخ (history project). اقرأ الخيارات قبل الاستماع حتى تعرف أنك تنتظر نوع المشروع.

questions.text: Most of the participants at a picnic are …
questions.explanationAr: أغلب الحاضرين في النزهة كانوا عائلات (families).

questions.text: Who is the caller talking to?
questions.explanationAr: المتصل يرتّب رحلة سفر، فالطرف الآخر وكيل سفر (travel agent).

questions.text: When will the caller fly?
questions.explanationAr: ذكر المتصل موعد السفر: 13 سبتمبر.

questions.text: What is the traveler's reservation number?
questions.explanationAr: رقم الحجز هو 1066. رتّب الأرقام كما نُطقت بالضبط.

questions.text: The octopus can squeeze into tight spaces because it …

options.A: Uses its beak to pry open tight spaces
options.B: Has no internal or external skeleton

questions.explanationAr: الأخطبوط ليس له هيكل داخلي ولا خارجي، لذلك يستطيع الانضغاط في المساحات الضيقة.

questions.text: All octopuses are venomous but …

options.A: Only the blue-ringed octopus has been known to kill humans
options.B: There have been no known deaths in recent years
options.C: There have only been 300 reported deaths
options.D: None are deadly to human beings

questions.explanationAr: كل الأخطبوطات سامة، لكن الأخطبوط الأزرق الحلقي (blue-ringed) فقط هو المعروف بقتل البشر.

questions.text: This lecture is most likely to occur in …
questions.explanationAr: الحديث عن الأنهار والمواقع الجغرافية يدل على حصة جغرافيا.

questions.text: What is the second longest river in the world?
questions.explanationAr: ثاني أطول نهر في العالم هو الأمازون (Amazon)، ويأتي بعد النيل.

questions.text: Eyad is a good language learner because he …
questions.explanationAr: إياد متعلّم جيد للغة لأنه يحب التحدث مع الناس.

questions.text: What does Eyad say is the most important thing when learning a language?

options.C: Having an interest in learning English
options.D: Having a host family that only speaks English

questions.explanationAr: يقول إياد إن أهم شيء عند تعلم اللغة هو وجود اهتمام ورغبة (interest) في تعلمها.

questions.text: This announcement would probably be heard in an airport in …
questions.explanationAr: الإعلان يُسمع في مطار الدوحة (Doha).

questions.text: What has caused the delay?
questions.explanationAr: سبب التأخير مشكلة طبية (medical problem).

questions.text: Passengers are asked to board the flight at …
questions.explanationAr: طُلب من الركاب التوجه للصعود من بوابة A6.

questions.text: The woman's problem is that she …
questions.explanationAr: مشكلة المرأة أنها لا تستطيع تحديد وجهة السفر (where to go).

questions.text: We can conclude that the woman …
questions.explanationAr: نستنتج من كلامها أنها ترى أوروبا مكلفة (costly).

questions.text: We can conclude that the woman and her husband …

options.D: Spend lots of money on travel

questions.explanationAr: نستنتج أن لها ولزوجها أذواقاً مختلفة (different tastes) في اختيار الوجهة.

questions.text: The two people talking in the conversation are probably …

options.A: A receptionist and a university applicant
options.B: A secretary and a job applicant
options.C: A banker and a loan applicant
options.D: A boss and a new employee

questions.explanationAr: الحوار عن التقدّم لوظيفة، فهما سكرتير/موظف استقبال ومتقدّم لوظيفة (job applicant).

questions.text: The conversation probably takes place in a …
questions.explanationAr: سياق المقابلة الوظيفية يدل على أن المكان مكتب عمل (business office).

questions.text: My sister's name is Anna. ...... is eight years old.
questions.explanationAr: Anna اسم أنثى، فنحتاج ضمير فاعل مؤنث She.

questions.text: Russia is ...... than Canada.
questions.explanationAr: لوجود than نستخدم صيغة المقارنة بإضافة er للصفة القصيرة bigger.

questions.text: He went to university in the UK ...... a PhD in physics.
questions.explanationAr: لبيان الغرض (لكي يحصل على) نستخدم to + المصدر.

questions.text: In my opinion, it is not economical ........ your money on cheap, poor-quality products.
questions.explanationAr: بعد الصفات (economical) نستخدم to + المصدر.

questions.text: The computer costs so ........ money that the family decided not to buy it.
questions.explanationAr: money اسم غير معدود، فيأخذ much وليس many.

questions.text: Go outside and ......... the gardener some water. He needs a break.
questions.explanationAr: الجملة أمرية (Imperative) معطوفة على Go، فيأتي الفعل في المصدر bring.

questions.text: In which sentence is all CAPITALIZATION correct?

options.A: Running late, he yelled, "Stop!" as he chased after the kingdom university bus that took him to work every morning.
options.B: Running late, he yelled, "Stop!" as he chased after the Kingdom university bus that took him to work every morning.
options.C: Running late, he yelled, "Stop!" as he chased after the Kingdom University bus that took him to work every morning.
options.D: Running late, He yelled, "Stop!" as he chased after the Kingdom University bus that took him to work every morning.

questions.explanationAr: أسماء الجامعات (Kingdom University) يجب أن تُكتب بحروف كبيرة.

questions.text: In which sentence is all CAPITALIZATION correct?

options.A: Among John's favorite places to travel were malaysia, morocco, and any exotic location with a nice, clean beach.
options.B: Among John's favorite places to travel were Malaysia, Morocco, and any Exotic Location with a nice, clean beach.
options.C: Among John's favorite places to travel were Malaysia, Morocco, and any exotic location with a nice, clean beach.
options.D: Among John's favorite Places to Travel were Malaysia, Morocco, and any exotic location with a nice, clean beach.

questions.explanationAr: أسماء الدول (Malaysia, Morocco) بحروف كبيرة، والكلمات العامة (exotic location) بحروف صغيرة.

questions.text: Which sentence has the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: And then they would start getting ready for bed, after eating dinner, the family used to read books while drinking tea.
options.B: After eating dinner, the family used to read books while drinking tea, and then they would start getting ready for bed.
options.C: After eating dinner, and then they would start getting ready for bed, the family used to read books while drinking tea.
options.D: The family used to read books while drinking tea, and then they would start getting ready, after eating dinner, for bed.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب المنطقي: ظرف الزمان (After eating) ثم الفاعل والفعل، ثم حدث لاحق (and then).

questions.text:
-May I speak to Mr. Ben please?
-I'm afraid he ................. an errand right now. Could you call back?
questions.explanationAr: كلمة right now تدل على المضارع المستمر is running.

questions.text: The students had been studying lesson one and the teacher wanted ................ lesson two.
questions.explanationAr: الفعل want يتبعه to + المصدر.

questions.text: The boys' mother told them to finish all of their breakfast, ...... they stuffed their mouths until their plates were empty.
questions.explanationAr: النتيجة (لذلك قاموا بحشو أفواههم) تحتاج رابط النتيجة so.

questions.text: At tomorrow's event, a large sum of money ...... by an anonymous supporter.
questions.explanationAr: الجملة مبني للمجهول في المستقبل (tomorrow)، فنستخدم will be + V3.

questions.text: A large box of dates ...... from my uncle.
questions.explanationAr: الفاعل هو A large box (مفرد) فيأخذ has وليس have.

questions.text: Bob ...... on holiday last year.
questions.explanationAr: في الماضي البسيط المنفي نستخدم didn't + المصدر.

questions.text: Which sentence has the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: He claimed he was simply meditating, but when asked about it later, Adam had obviously fallen asleep while sitting on the couch.
options.B: Adam had obviously fallen asleep while sitting on the couch, but when asked about it later, he claimed he was simply meditating.
options.C: Adam had obviously fallen asleep while sitting on the couch, he claimed he was simply meditating, but when asked about it later.
options.D: While sitting on the couch, but when asked about it later, he claimed he was simply meditating, Adam had obviously fallen asleep.

questions.explanationAr: هذا الترتيب يسرد الأحداث تسلسليًا بشكل منطقي ويوضح من هو الفاعل (Adam) قبل استخدام الضمير (he).

questions.text: Steve's watch was not working properly ...... he took it to a repair shop.
questions.explanationAr: لأنه لم يكن يعمل (سبب)، أرسله للتصليح (نتيجة) = so.

questions.text:
To which sentence from the paragraph below can we add the following clause?
Since she was living in Saudi Arabia, ..........................................
[1] Sarah wanted to learn Arabic.
[2] To start, she made a flash card for each letter...
[3] She practiced with the flash cards...
[4] Then she bought children's books...
questions.explanationAr: الجملة تمهد لسبب رغبتها في تعلم اللغة العربية (لأنها كانت تعيش في السعودية).

questions.text: Which sentence has the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: Invented by Thomas Edison, was the electric light bulb, one of the many commercially successful products, an essential element of our modern lives.
options.B: One of the many commercially successful products, an essential element of our modern lives was invented by Thomas Edison, the electric light bulb.
options.C: The electric light bulb, an essential element of our modern lives, was one of the many commercially successful products invented by Thomas Edison.
options.D: An essential element of our modern lives, one of the many commercially successful products, was invented the electric light bulb by Thomas Edison.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب الصحيح: الفاعل (The light bulb) + جملة اعتراضية وصفية + الفعل (was).

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases in the following is INCORRECT?
Did you know that the tree over there might actually been hundreds of years old?
questions.explanationAr: بعد might نستخدم المصدر (be) وليس التصريف الثالث (been).

questions.text: Which sentence as the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: Catching ants that were crawling around inside the house, the boys spent the whole afternoon and putting them outside in the garden.
options.B: The boys spent the whole afternoon catching ants that were crawling around inside the house and putting them outside in the garden.
options.C: Catching ants that were crawling around inside the house and putting them outside in the garden, the boys spent the whole afternoon.
options.D: The boys spent the whole afternoon and putting them outside in the garden, catching ants that were crawling around inside the house.

questions.explanationAr: التركيب الصحيح: الفاعل (The boys) + الفعل (spent) + الوقت (the whole afternoon) + الفعل المضاف له ing.

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
Tom and Adam went to play tennis at the sports club hours ago, and still has not returned home for lunch yet.
questions.explanationAr: الفاعل جمع (Tom and Adam) فيجب استخدام have وليس has.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words in the sentence is INCORRECT?
To become a doctor and to helping sick children are the goals that Lucy hopes to achieve after she finishes her undergraduate university courses.
questions.explanationAr: بعد to نستخدم المصدر (help) وليس (helping).

questions.text: Working in a university last year ...... very interesting.
questions.explanationAr: كلمة last year دالة على الماضي البسيط was.

questions.text: If I ...... my car back from the mechanic tomorrow, I will travel to Dubai.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الأولى: If + مضارع بسيط (get)، والطرف الثاني will + المصدر.

questions.text: I do not understand this sentence. What ...........................?
questions.explanationAr: في تكوين السؤال: أداة الاستفهام + فعل مساعد (does) + الفاعل (this word) + الفعل الأساسي (mean).

questions.text: He worked ............. forty years before he decided to retire.
questions.explanationAr: لبيان طول المدة الزمنية (forty years) نستخدم for.

questions.text:
A: The maintenance man was here today.
B: Good! .......... you remember to tell him to fix the stairs?
questions.explanationAr: السؤال عن حدث في الماضي (was here today) يتطلب استخدام Did.

questions.text: In England, many children ............. wear school uniforms; they can't come to school if they don't.
questions.explanationAr: للإلزام الخارجي (قوانين المدرسة) نستخدم have to.

questions.text: That's a beautiful new jacket! Where ......................... you buy it?
questions.explanationAr: السؤال عن عملية الشراء التي حدثت في الماضي يتطلب did.

questions.text: All of your travel plans have been made. When you arrive, someone ............. for you at the airport.
questions.explanationAr: حدث سيكون مستمرًا في نقطة معينة في المستقبل = مستقبل مستمر will be waiting.

questions.text: The children could not ...... out to ride their bikes because it was raining.
questions.explanationAr: بعد الأفعال الناقصة (could) يأتي الفعل في المصدر (go).

questions.text: They went to bed as soon as their guests ........... left.
questions.explanationAr: حدثان في الماضي، الأسبق (مغادرة الضيوف) يأخذ ماضي تام (had left).

questions.text: Does Chris have to go home now? Let him .......... a while longer.
questions.explanationAr: بعد الفعل Let يأتي المفعول به ثم الفعل في المصدر بدون to.

questions.text: Tom cannot remember ..................
questions.explanationAr: الجملة هنا ليست سؤالًا مباشرًا (Embedded Question)، فالترتيب يكون: أداة الاستفهام + الفاعل + الفعل.

questions.text: Dairy products should ......................... to keep them fresh.
questions.explanationAr: مبني للمجهول مع الأفعال الناقصة: should + be + V3.

questions.text: The box ............................. from recycled paper.
questions.explanationAr: مبني للمجهول في الماضي: الصندوق صُنِع (was made).

questions.text: if I ....................... there, I ....................... said something to the manager.
questions.explanationAr: حالة If الثالثة للندم في الماضي: If + ماضي تام (had been)، والطرف الثاني would have + V3.

questions.text: After he ................. the door, he discovered that his keys were not in his pocket.
questions.explanationAr: حدثان في الماضي، الأول (إغلاق الباب) أسبق، فيأخذ الماضي التام (had closed).

questions.text:
To which sentence below can we add the following clause?
- Are you going to the party tonight? .........................
questions.explanationAr: الرد المناسب على السؤال هو You bet (بالتأكيد).

questions.text: If it rains tomorrow, I .................... my raincoat.
questions.explanationAr: حالة If الأولى: مضارع بسيط (rains)، والطرف الثاني will + المصدر.

questions.text: Adam …………… a book now.
questions.explanationAr: كلمة now تدل على المضارع المستمر is + ing.

questions.text: When I go to King Saud University Library, I usually ………………
questions.explanationAr: كلمة usually تدل على العادة والتكرار = مضارع بسيط.

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
I don't had enough money to buy a bus ticket, so I'll have to walk to school today.
questions.explanationAr: بعد don't يجب أن يأتي المصدر (have) وليس (had).

questions.text: Which of the following sentences has the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: A lot of value to our company both Ben and Mike add, but are more important to us Ben's IT skills than Mike's marketing knowledge.
options.B: Ben and Mike add a lot of value to our company both, but Ben's IT skills are more important to us than Mike's marketing knowledge.
options.C: Both Ben and Mike add a lot of value to our company, but Ben's IT skills are more important to us than Mike's marketing knowledge.
options.D: But Ben's IT skills are more important to us than Mike's marketing knowledge, a lot of value to our company Ben and Mike both add.

questions.explanationAr: هذا الترتيب الصحيح: الفاعل Both Ben and Mike ثم الفعل add والمفعول به.

questions.text: Which sentence is correct?

options.A: Your maintenance appointment has on Tuesday or Wednesday.
options.B: You're maintenance appointment will be on Tuesday or Wednesday.
options.C: You're maintenance appointment is on Tuesday or Wednesday.
options.D: Your maintenance appointment will be on Tuesday or Wednesday.

questions.explanationAr: استخدام Your (صفة ملكية) هو الصحيح وليس You're (You are).

questions.text: In which of the following sentences is all PUNCTUATION correct?

options.A: After all, the motor cycle's are sold, whos' going to get the biggest bonus?
options.B: After all the motor cycles are sold, who's going to get the biggest bonus.
options.C: After all the motor cycles are sold, who's going to get the biggest bonus?
options.D: After all, the motor cycles are sold, whos going to get the biggest bonus.

questions.explanationAr: لا نضع فاصلة مقلوبة (apostrophe) في جمع الكلمات (cycles)، ونضعها في الاختصار who is (who's)، وينتهي السؤال بعلامة استفهام.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words or phrases INCORRECT?
Last month, Ahmad sends over ten messages to his boss about his job situation.
questions.explanationAr: لوجود Last month يجب استخدام الماضي البسيط (sent) وليس المضارع.

questions.text: Dave sold his car ……………. he moved to a new city.
questions.explanationAr: أفضل رابط يوضح المعنى الزمني هو when (عندما انتقل).

questions.text: I met …………………… friends for dinner last night.
questions.explanationAr: some تُستخدم في الجملة المثبتة مع الأسماء الجمع (friends).

questions.text: I am a little busy now. Can you come back after …………. minutes?
questions.explanationAr: minutes اسم جمع معدود، فنستخدم a few (بضع دقائق).

questions.text: If you …………. a new phone, can I have your old one?
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الأولى: الطرف الأول مضارع بسيط (buy) والطرف الثاني فيه can.

questions.text: Since you are home early, ……………… you like to watch a movie?
questions.explanationAr: أسلوب العرض المهذب (Polite offer) نستخدم فيه Would you like.

questions.text: Ahmed ………. a good horse rider, but then he got injured.
questions.explanationAr: للتعبير عن عادة أو حالة في الماضي وانتهت نستخدم used to + المصدر.

questions.text: Nora has not been to Paris ………….2005.
questions.explanationAr: مع السنوات ونقطة بداية الحدث نستخدم since في المضارع التام.

questions.text: Steve has worked at Aramco ………………. six years.
questions.explanationAr: مع المدة الزمنية المحسوبة (six years) نستخدم for.

questions.text: Could you all please prepare ………for the exam? It will take place on Monday.
questions.explanationAr: لأن المخاطب جمع (you all) نستخدم الضمير الانعكاسي الجمع yourselves.

questions.text: If you wait 20 minutes, I can take you to the clinic ……………….
questions.explanationAr: ضمير انعكاسي للتأكيد على الفاعل (I) وهو myself.

questions.text: Amy can't find her car keys. Where …………. she put them?
questions.explanationAr: السؤال عن حدث في الماضي (أين وضعتهم) يتطلب did.

questions.text: I asked her if she usually ……………….for exercise.
questions.explanationAr: الجملة منقولة (Reported Speech) فالفعل الأساسي في الماضي (asked)، لذا يُحوّل فعل العادة إلى الماضي cycled.

questions.text: A huge amount of cake ………. at the party.
questions.explanationAr: مبني للمجهول: الكعكة سيتم أكلها (will be eaten).

questions.text: Japanese is so difficult. I've been trying to learn it …………… five years.
questions.explanationAr: المدة الزمنية (five years) مع المضارع التام المستمر تأخذ for.

questions.text: I ……………in this company since 2009.
questions.explanationAr: لوجود since نستخدم المضارع التام المستمر have been working.

questions.text: Chris met the man ……………. he guessed was the manager.
questions.explanationAr: ضمير الوصل للعاقل في محل فاعل هو who.

questions.text: Neither the student …………… the teacher could understand the question.
questions.explanationAr: قاعدة Neither يأتي معها دائماً nor.

questions.text: If I ………. you, I would definitely watch the new Saudi drama series.
questions.explanationAr: في الحالة الشرطية الثانية لتقديم النصيحة نستخدم If I were you.

questions.text: If I ……… enough time, I would have visited Oxford.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الثالثة: الطرف الأول يجب أن يكون ماضي تام (had + V3) فتصبح had had.

questions.text: When you go to the shop, ………………... you get me some milk, please?
questions.explanationAr: للطلب المهذب نستخدم would you.

questions.text: Adam doesn't like football. He ……………. prefer to watch tennis.
questions.explanationAr: للتعبير عن احتمالية أو تفضيل محتمل نستخدم might.

questions.text: To open your bank account, please speak to the lady ……... is sitting at desk number 1.
questions.explanationAr: ضمير الوصل للعاقل الفاعل (who)، ولا نكرر الفاعل she.

questions.text: Ask Mary if she knows where ……………….
questions.explanationAr: سؤال ضمني (Embedded Question) فنستخدم الترتيب الطبيعي: الفاعل (you) + الفعل (put).

questions.text: In which sentence is all CAPITALIZATION correct?

options.A: Last week, he looked at several course descriptions before deciding what subjects to study at dammam university
options.B: Last week, he looked at several course descriptions before deciding what subjects to study at Dammam University
options.C: Last week, he looked at several course descriptions before deciding what subjects to study at Dammam university
options.D: Last week, He looked at several course descriptions before deciding what subjects to study at Dammam University.

questions.explanationAr: اسم الجامعة يجب أن يكون بحروف كبيرة (Dammam University) والضمير he في منتصف الجملة بحرف صغير.

questions.text: Sara was too sick to go to work today, …………….. she stayed home and relaxed instead.
questions.explanationAr: النتيجة لمرضها أنها بقيت في المنزل، فنستخدم so.

questions.text: Which sentence as the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: Our neighbor said she would like to visit Italy after she has sold her farm and has more time to travel.
options.B: After she has sold her farm our neighbor said she would like to visit Italy and has more time to travel.
options.C: Our neighbor said she would like to visit, and has more time to travel, after she has sold her farm Italy.
options.D: Our neighbor said she would like to visit after she has sold her farm and has more time to travel Italy.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب المنطقي والواضح للأحداث وتوافق المفعول به (visit Italy).

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
Language teachers like explain, giving examples, and engaging students in discussions. After each lesson, they need to evaluate it before planning the next one.
questions.explanationAr: العطف (Parallelism) يتطلب تطابق الصيغ: giving و engaging فيها ing، فيجب أن تكون explaining.

questions.text: In which sentence is all CAPATALIZATION correct?

options.A: At first, my cousin, Dave, wanted to work as a technician at Microsoft Corporation, but his best friend, Mr. Carter told him to get a job at Apple instead after completing his contract.
options.B: At first, my Cousin, Dave, wanted to work as a Technician at Microsoft Corporation, but his best friend, mr. Carter told him to get a job at Apple instead after completing his Contract.
options.C: At first, my cousin, dave, wanted to work as a Technician at Microsoft corporation, but his best Friend, Mr. Carter told him to get a job at apple instead after completing his Contract.
options.D: At First, my cousin, Dave, wanted to work as a technician at Microsoft Corporation, but his best friend, mr. Carter told him to get a job at Apple instead after completing his contract.

questions.explanationAr: الوظائف العامة (technician, cousin) بحروف صغيرة، والأسماء والشركات والألقاب (Dave, Microsoft Corporation, Mr. Carter, Apple) بحروف كبيرة.

questions.text: He did not have ………………. money in his wallet, so he stopped by the cash machine.
questions.explanationAr: في النفي ومع الاسم غير المعدود (money) نستخدم much.

questions.text: Would someone please tell him the correct answer to the question that he ……?
questions.explanationAr: الجملة تصف سؤالاً طرحه في الماضي (asked)، ولا نستخدم ضمير المفعول it لتعود على question لأن ضمير الوصل that حل محله.

questions.text: The strawberries ……………. by the children who picked them.
questions.explanationAr: مبني للمجهول في الماضي البسيط: تم أكلها (were eaten).

questions.text: Mr. Amir, ………… the students call Uncle Amir, taught the boys physical education several times a week.
questions.explanationAr: الضمير يعود على عاقل وهو في موقع المفعول به لـ (call)، لذا نستخدم whom (أو who في العامية).

questions.text: People over forty need …………. regular check-ups at least once a year.
questions.explanationAr: الفعل need يتبعه to + المصدر.

questions.text: In which of the following sentences is all PUNCTUATION correct?

options.A: After all, the exams are finished, whos going to be the first in the class.
options.B: After all the exams are finished, who's going to be the first in the class.
options.C: After all, the exam's are finished, whos' going to be the first in the class?
options.D: After all the exams are finished, who's going to be the first in the class?

questions.explanationAr: نستخدم الفاصلة المقلوبة who's للاختصار (who is)، ولا نستخدمها للجمع (exams)، وينتهي السؤال بعلامة استفهام.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
Last night, Alia makes Vietnamese rice pudding with black-eyed peas for dessert.
questions.explanationAr: لوجود Last night يجب أن يكون الفعل ماضيًا (made) وليس (makes).

questions.text: Which of the following sentences has the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: A lot of protein both tea and coffee contain, but the acids in the tea than the caffeine in the coffee are healthier.
options.B: Tea and coffee contain protein both a lot, but in the tea are healthier the acids than in coffee the caffeine.
options.C: Both tea and coffee contain a lot of protein, but the acids in the tea are healthier than the caffeine in the coffee.
options.D: But in the tea the acids are healthier than in the coffee the caffeine, a lot of protein both tea and coffee contain.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب الصحيح هو الفاعل Both tea and coffee + الفعل contain + المفعول. والجملة الثانية تتبع ترتيب المقارنة الصحيح.

questions.text: Which sentence is correct?

options.A: Your job interview will be next Tuesday.
options.B: You're job interview will be next Tuesday.
options.C: You're job interview is next Tuesday.
options.D: Your job interview has next Tuesday.

questions.explanationAr: Your (صيغة الملكية) هي الصحيحة، وليست You're (You are).

questions.text: In which of the following sentences is all PUNCTUATION correct?

options.A: After all, the matche's are finished, whos' going to be the at the top of the league?
options.B: After all the matches are finished, who's going to be the at the top of the league.
options.C: After all the matches are finished, who's going to be at the top of the league?
options.D: After all, the matches are finished, whos going to be the at the top of the league.

questions.explanationAr: تجمع matches بدون فاصلة مقلوبة، وتُكتب who's اختصاراً لـ who is، ونختم بعلامة استفهام.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
Last month, Anna speaks three times about her new business plan to her manager.
questions.explanationAr: Last month تتطلب فعلاً في الماضي البسيط (spoke) بدلاً من speaks.

questions.text: Ben lost his essay…………. his laptop broke.
questions.explanationAr: when (عندما) هي الرابط المنطقي لبيان متى فقد مقاله.

questions.text: Excuse me Jan, …………... you please buy some pens from the bookshop for me?
questions.explanationAr: في الطلب المهذب (Polite Request) نستخدم would you.

questions.text: If you want to be a college professor you …………… hard for many years.
questions.explanationAr: must يتبعها الفعل في المصدر بدون أي إضافات (must work).

questions.text: If you watch Jonson’s lecture on YouTube, you ………... the finance course much better.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الأولى: مضارع (watch) يُقابله will + مصدر.

questions.text: If Mrs. Hill finishes writing her new book, she ………… with her family.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الأولى: مضارع (finishes) يُقابله will + مصدر.

questions.text: I actually ……. to study English, but my friends told me to study Spanish instead.
questions.explanationAr: زمن الجملة ماضٍ لوجود (told me)، فالفعل الأول يجب أن يكون ماضيًا (wanted).

questions.text: I fell asleep while I ……………… for the project.
questions.explanationAr: بعد while يأتي الماضي المستمر (was/were + ing).

questions.text: Sara, …………………… is teaching Math 101?
questions.explanationAr: للسؤال عن الفاعل العاقل نستخدم who.

questions.text: The teacher told students …………. about the exam.
questions.explanationAr: النفي في الأوامر المنقولة (Reported commands) يكون بـ not to + المصدر.

questions.text: Professor Harris has been reading in his office …………… eight hours without taking a break.
questions.explanationAr: مع المدة الزمنية المحسوبة (eight hours) نستخدم for.

questions.text: George's favorite book is “Crime and Punishment” ………. one is yours?
questions.explanationAr: للتخيير أو السؤال عن شيء محدد من خيارات نستخدم which.

questions.text:
Joe: Do you have time to watch the news or are you too busy with your studies?
Ted: Yes, I watch …………….. every day.
questions.explanationAr: news اسم مفرد غير معدود ويعود عليه الضمير it.

questions.text: I will travel to England next term; It will be…………… amazing.
questions.explanationAr: نحتاج حال (adverb) لوصف الصفة amazing.

questions.text: You need to work much ………….. Linda. This is a difficult course.
questions.explanationAr: وجود much قبل الصفة يؤكد على المقارنة (أصعب بكثير)، فنحتاج صيغة مقارنة harder.

questions.text: Dave has almost finished reading the book. He only has …………… pages left.
questions.explanationAr: pages اسم جمع معدود، فنستخدم a few.

questions.text: A good teacher makes his students …………., not just memorize information.
questions.explanationAr: الفعل make (بمعنى يَجعَل) يتبعه المفعول به ثم الفعل في المصدر من دون to (Bare Infinitive).

questions.text: Don't feel stressed when …………. your term paper. You need to work carefully if you want it to be good.
questions.explanationAr: يمكن اختصار الجملة بعد when باستخدام verb+ing مباشرة (when writing = when you are writing).

questions.text: I wouldn’t study art history if I ……………….. you.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الثانية لتقديم النصيحة: If I were you.

questions.text: College is much easier for a student …………. has gone to a good high school.
questions.explanationAr: who ضمير وصل للعاقل يحل محل الفاعل، ولا نحتاج لتكرار الضمير he.

questions.text: Yesterday Mr. Carter told me he doesn’t know from which bookshop ………….
questions.explanationAr: الجملة الضمنية (Embedded Question) تعود للترتيب الطبيعي: الفاعل (the marketing book) + الفعل (is available).

questions.text: He said that the class …………….. at 1:30, but it actually started at 6:30.
questions.explanationAr: الماضي من will هو would (للتعبير عن المستقبل من منظور الماضي).

questions.text: The students ………….… a new way to process water for six months now.
questions.explanationAr: وجود for six months now يشير إلى فعل بدأ في الماضي ومستمر حتى الآن: المضارع التام المستمر.

questions.text: Which Sentence is CAPITALIZATION correct?

options.A: Last week, she listened to three lectures to prepare for her three lectures at london university tomorrow.
options.B: Last week, she listened to three lectures to prepare for her three lectures at London University tomorrow.
options.C: Last week, she listened to three lectures to prepare for her three lectures at London university tomorrow.
options.D: Last week, She listened to three lectures to prepare for her three lectures at london University tomorrow.

questions.explanationAr: London University اسم مكان يجب كتابته بحروف كبيرة.

questions.text: Roger was too lazy to work last night, ………… he had a cup of coffee and watched some YouTube videos.
questions.explanationAr: so توضح النتيجة (نتيجة للكسل، قام بمشاهدة يوتيوب).

questions.text: Which sentence has the CORRECT WORD ORDER?

options.A: Mark said he would like to visit Brazil, after he has finished his studies and found a good job.
options.B: Mark said he would like to visit Brazil, and has found a good job, after he has finished his studies.
options.C: Mark said he would like to visit, and found a good job, Brazil after he has finished his studies.
options.D: Mark said he would like to visit, after he has finished his studies and found a good job, Brazil.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب الصحيح يضع الظرف الزمني (after) بعد اكتمال المعنى الأساسي، ولا يفصل بين الفعل والمفعول به (visit Brazil).

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
University professors like read, writing, and publishing during their work day. After a lot of reading, they need some time relax before starting to write.
questions.explanationAr: للمحافظة على التوازي (Parallelism) يجب استخدام reading توافقاً مع writing و publishing.

questions.text: In which sentence is all CAPITALIZATION correct?

options.A: At first, my sister, Kate, wanted to study chemistry at King Faisal University, but one of her teachers, Mrs. Carter, told her to join the College of Engineering after she finishes the first semester in January
options.B: At first, my Sister, Kate, wanted to study Chemistry at King Faisal University, but one of her Teachers, mrs. Carter, told her to join the College of engineering after she finishes the First Semester in January.
options.C: At first, my sister, Kate, wanted to study Chemistry at King faisal university, but one of her Teachers, Mrs. Carter, told her to join the college of Engineering after she finishes the first semester in January.
options.D: At First, my sister, Kate, wanted to study chemistry at King Faisal University, but one of her teachers, mrs. Carter, told her to join the College of engineering after she finishes the First Semester in January.

questions.explanationAr: التخصصات لا تأخذ حرفاً كبيراً (chemistry) إلا إذا كانت جزءاً من اسم الكلية (College of Engineering).

questions.text: A: Is it Rami’s turn to start the game? B: No, it isn't. It’s …………………
questions.explanationAr: yours ضمير ملكية يأتي في النهاية ولا يحتاج لاسم بعده.

questions.text: Airplanes usually travel …….....…….. helicopters.
questions.explanationAr: الصفة القصيرة تأخذ er (faster) ولا يجوز دمجها مع more.

questions.text: All members of my family...........…..the pilgrimage to Makkah at least once in their lives.
questions.explanationAr: إنجازات الحياة بدون وقت محدد تأخذ المضارع التام (have performed).

questions.text:
Choose the best way to join these sentences.
(She likes drinking tea. She doesn't like drinking coffee.)

options.A: She likes drinking tea, but she doesn't like drinking coffee.
options.B: She likes drinking tea, so she doesn't like drinking coffee.
options.C: She likes drinking tea because she doesn't like drinking coffee.
options.D: She likes drinking tea or she doesn't like drinking coffee.

questions.explanationAr: جملتان متناقضتان (إثبات ونفي) نستخدم but.

questions.text: If I ...... this year, I will celebrate with a big cake.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الأولى: الطرف الأول مضارع بسيط (graduate).

questions.text: When I was in college ...... a very good student.
questions.explanationAr: للتعبير عن حالة ماضية انتهت نستخدم used to + المصدر.

questions.text: I'm so busy with my term paper. I haven't slept much ...... last Thursday.
questions.explanationAr: مع المضارع التام وبداية النقطة الزمنية (last Thursday) نستخدم since.

questions.text: When I logged on to the course website, I was happy to find that my paper ...... two days ago.
questions.explanationAr: حدث وقع قبل حدث آخر في الماضي (تم تصحيحها قبل دخولي) ومبني للمجهول: ماضي تام مبني للمجهول (had been + V3).

questions.text: I need to go to the bookstore. I don't have ...... books for the Engineering course.
questions.explanationAr: any تُستخدم مع النفي (don't have).

questions.text: It has been really nice teaching this course. I hope you have enjoyed...... as much as I have.
questions.explanationAr: المخاطب جمع (طلاب)، فنستخدم الضمير الانعكاسي للجمع yourselves.

questions.text: I met ...... teachers at the conference last week, but I didn't meet any students.
questions.explanationAr: في الجمل المثبتة مع الجمع نستخدم some.

questions.text: If the teacher asks you a question, you ...... immediately.
questions.explanationAr: بعد must يأتي الفعل في المصدر.

questions.text:
Jane: Do you eat a lot of fast food at university?
Jenny: Yes, I eat ...... two or three times a week.
questions.explanationAr: fast food اسم غير معدود يعود عليه الضمير المفرد it.

questions.text: When the students ...... hard, they pass their exams.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if/when الصفرية للحقائق: مضارع بسيط + مضارع بسيط (study).

questions.text: Dave is ............ in English of all the students.
questions.explanationAr: صيغة تفضيل على الجميع (of all) نستخدم the + est للصفة القصيرة.

questions.text:
Judy: I saw Mrs. Nora yesterday.
Julia: Really? ...... she still teach Computer Science?
questions.explanationAr: السؤال عن حقيقة أو فعل حالي منتظم نستخدم المضارع البسيط Does.

questions.text: Our professor told us ...... about the exam. He said it would be easy.
questions.explanationAr: نفي الأمر غير المباشر بـ not to + المصدر.

questions.text: Mike was in class when his brother ...... him.
questions.explanationAr: when تربط الماضي المستمر بالماضي البسيط القاطع (called).

questions.text: This book ...... by Mr. Johnston, the Marketing teacher, three years ago.
questions.explanationAr: مبني للمجهول في الماضي لوجود ago = was + V3.

questions.text: Students ...... expected to write very long papers in their first year.
questions.explanationAr: مبني للمجهول في المضارع، فنستخدم verb to be (are).

questions.text: Mr. Harris has been a teacher ...... ten years.
questions.explanationAr: للمدة المحسوبة نستخدم for.

questions.text: If Mrs. Smith had had more time, she ...... have planned her lessons better.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الثالثة تتطلب would have + V3.

questions.text: Fatima failed her final exam, so she ...... take the course again.
questions.explanationAr: الإلزام في الماضي يُعبّر عنه بـ had to.

questions.text: The professor ...... teaches us English is very good.
questions.explanationAr: عاقل (فاعل) نستخدم who ولا نكرر الضمير he.

questions.text: I ...... become an engineer if I could, but I don't have good grades.
questions.explanationAr: حالة if الثانية (ماضي + would) للتعبير عن تمني الخيال.

questions.text: When you submit your essays, ...... you leave the room quietly, please?
questions.explanationAr: Would you للطلب المهذب.

questions.text: I don't know how ...... to answer that question. It was very easy.
questions.explanationAr: الجملة ليست سؤالاً مباشراً، فنتبع الترتيب العادي: أداة الاستفهام + الفاعل + الفعل.

questions.text: My uncle told me ...... mathematics because it is very difficult.
questions.explanationAr: نفي الأمر المنقول بـ not to + المصدر.

questions.text: Bob wrote a very nice and well-organized essay, just like his teacher ...... him.
questions.explanationAr: حدث التعليم (had taught) وقع قبل حدث الكتابة (wrote) فيأخذ الماضي التام.

questions.text: Mrs. Davis, ...... we saw at the lecture last week, is in London for a confernce.
questions.explanationAr: عاقل في موقع المفعول به يأخذ whom.

questions.text: Did you know that neither Ted ...... Tom graduated this year?
questions.explanationAr: قاعدة neither دائماً مرتبطة بـ nor.

questions.text: He is a teacher, ...... so is his brother.
questions.explanationAr: and تعطف بين الجملتين الموافقتين في المعنى.

questions.text: Which sentence has the CORRECT PUNCTUATION?

options.A: After, school ended we traveled to London.
options.B: After school, ended we traveled to London.
options.C: After school ended we, traveled to London.
options.D: After school ended, we traveled to London.

questions.explanationAr: إذا بدأت الجملة برابط زمني (After)، نضع فاصلة بين الجملتين.

questions.text: Choose the sentence with the RIGHT WORD ORDER.

options.A: I wonder what time he usually comes back from work.
options.B: I wonder what time comes he usually back from work.
options.C: I wonder what time usually comes he back from work.
options.D: I wonder what time he comes usually back from work.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب الصحيح في الأسئلة الضمنية: أداة الاستفهام + الفاعل + ظرف التكرار + الفعل.

questions.text: Would you mind ......? I can't see the TV.
questions.explanationAr: بعد mind نستخدم الفعل المضاف له ing.

questions.text: Choose the sentence with the RIGHT WORD ORDER.

options.A: A four-year course in Business Studies is taking Noura.
options.B: Noura is taking a four-year course in Business studies.
options.C: Noura is taking in Business Studies a four-year course.
options.D: In Business Studies is Noura taking a four-year course.

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب المنطقي: الفاعل + الفعل + المفعول به كاملاً.

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
Ibn Firas is well known in the Arab World for he's early airplane.
questions.explanationAr: صفة الملكية هي his وليس الاختصار he's.

questions.text:
To which sentence from the paragraph below can we add the following phrase?
......, who had just had an operation.

options.A: (1) Ahmad was going to the hospital to see his uncle.
options.B: (2) On the way, he met his friend, Dr. Khaled.
options.C: (3) They walked together until they reached the hospital.
options.D: (4) After sending greetings and wishes for a speedy recovery...

questions.explanationAr: العبارة تصف (uncle) ولذلك تضاف بعد كلمة uncle في الجملة الأولى.

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
I usually drink tea without milk, but since I had a stomachache, I drunk it with milk.
questions.explanationAr: الماضي البسيط من drink هو drank. أما drunk فهو التصريف الثالث ولا يأتي بمفرده.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
This is lecture important, so you really must try your best...
questions.explanationAr: في الإنجليزية تسبق الصفة الموصوف، فيجب أن تكون an important lecture.

questions.text:
Sara: Help! I lost my key and can't get into my house!
Mona: Don't worry, I…………. send my son to help you.
questions.explanationAr: لاتخاذ قرار سريع والمساعدة الفورية نستخدم will.

questions.text: If you want to become a doctor, you……… go to the college of medicine.
questions.explanationAr: نستخدم should لإعطاء نصيحة، ولا نستخدم ought لأنها تتطلب to (ought to).

questions.text: Many students from different parts of the world attend my classes at the university; …...….

options.A: some of them are Arabs but the rest are from the Far East
options.B: all of them are from Bahrain
options.C: some of them are Arabs but the rest are from Bahrain
options.D: all of them are from the Far East

questions.explanationAr: هذا الخيار يكمل فكرة "different parts of the world" من خلال ذكر أماكن متعددة ومتباعدة.

questions.text: Eric: Is this……………. car? Matt: No, it's not. My car is over there.
questions.explanationAr: قبل الاسم (car) نضع صفة ملكية your.

questions.text: Don't stop, Dave. Keep……………
questions.explanationAr: بعد keep نستخدم الفعل المضاف له ing.

questions.text: The weather……………. warm these days.
questions.explanationAr: هذه الأيام (these days) تشير إلى تغير مستمر حالياً فيأخذ المضارع المستمر.

questions.text: I think I…………. take an English course next summer.
questions.explanationAr: لتوقع المستقبل باستخدام I think نستخدم will.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
My father he gave that watch to me when I graduated from high school.
questions.explanationAr: يجب ألا يتكرر الفاعل باستخدام اسم (My father) ثم ضمير (he).

questions.text: By this time next week, I…………. on a beach in Malaysia.
questions.explanationAr: استخدام by this time next week يعبر عن المستقبل المستمر (will be + V+ing).

questions.text: The weather…………. September was very warm this year.
questions.explanationAr: مع الشهور نستخدم حرف الجر in.

questions.text: Nouf is having trouble with math at school, so she…………to find a tutor.
questions.explanationAr: هي حالياً تواجه مشكلة لذا هي تحاول (المضارع المستمر is trying).

questions.text: Essam flew to Riyadh from Jeddah and then he…………….

options.A: a taxi to my house took to surprise me
options.B: to surprise me to my house took a taxi
options.C: took a taxi to surprise me to my house
options.D: took a taxi to my house to surprise me

questions.explanationAr: الترتيب الصحيح: الفعل (took a taxi) + المكان (to my house) + الغرض (to surprise me).

questions.text: My friend was sick, so I had to go to the party………….
questions.explanationAr: بمفردي تُقال by myself.

questions.text: The doctor introduced……………..to us.
questions.explanationAr: الضمير الانعكاسي العائد على doctor المفرد العاقل هو himself.

questions.text: The football game started at 8 o' clock,…………

options.A: and we arrived just in time for the second half
options.B: and we for the second half just arrived in time
options.C: and just in time we arrived for the second half
options.D: and just for the second half in time we arrived

questions.explanationAr: الفاعل ثم الفعل ثم الظرف הזمني.

questions.text:
Which one of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
Today we are going to review some of the chapters we discuss in our last lecture.
questions.explanationAr: أشرنا إلى محاضرة ماضية (last lecture) فيجب أن يكون الفعل في الماضي discussed.

questions.text: In which sentence is all CAPITALIZATION correct?
questions.explanationAr: بداية الجملة (He)، وأيام الأسبوع (Monday)، والشهور (September) يجب أن تكون بحروف كبيرة.

questions.text:
Which phrase correctly replaces the INCORRECT underlined phrase?
Walk along the road. I saw something strange in the nearby forest.
questions.explanationAr: لدمج الجملتين نقول: بينما كنت أمشي... ونعبر عنها باسم الفاعل Walking.

questions.text: To which sentence can we add the following clause? ......................................... until it boils.

options.A: (1) Making a cup of tea is easy.
options.C: (3) Then, pour it into a cup with a teabag and wait a couple of minutes
options.D: (4) Now, you can remove the teabag and drink it.

questions.explanationAr: نسخن الماء (حتى يغلي) until it boils.

questions.text: Jack was preparing the hamburgers…..….John was lighting the barbeque fire.
questions.explanationAr: لربط حدثين مستمرين متزامنين نستخدم while.

questions.text: The soldiers returned from the war……they had fought bravely for many months.
questions.explanationAr: الترتيب الزمني: قاتلوا أولاً (ماضي تام)، وبعد ذلك (after) عادوا.

questions.text: I think I took your book yesterday, and you took……………….
questions.explanationAr: ضمير الملكية المستقل هو mine ولا يحتاج لاسم بعده.

questions.text: Please do not touch………… that I put on the table as I want to take it to my class party.
questions.explanationAr: شيء محدد ومعروف من السياق (الذي وضعته على الطاولة) فيأخذ أداة التعريف the.

questions.text:
Which of the underlined words or phrases is INCORRECT?
I think all childs should help their parents.
questions.explanationAr: جمع كلمه child هو children (جمع شاذ)، ولا تضاف لها s.

questions.text: I want…………………. to the store because I need some food.
questions.explanationAr: الفعل want يأتي بعده to + المصدر.

questions.text: I felt a sleep while I …… for the project.
questions.explanationAr: while + الماضي المستمر was writing (حدث طويل).

questions.text: Jenny needs this book for her course; she …… . want us to buy it for her.
questions.explanationAr: must للاستنتاج المنطقي: لا بد أنها تريد.

questions.text: Hr. Harris has been a teacher …… ten years.
questions.explanationAr: for + مدة (ten years) مع المضارع التام.

questions.text: He is as a teacher, …… so is his brother.
questions.explanationAr: and so is his brother = وكذلك أخوه.

questions.text: To which sentence can we add the following clause? …… until it boils. (1) Making a cup of tea is easy. (2) First, you heat the water. (3) Then, pour it into a cup with a teabag and wait a couple of minutes (4) Now, you can remove the teabag and drink it.
questions.explanationAr: ‘until it boils’ تتبع ‘you heat the water’ وهي الجملة (2).

questions.text: I have known Alex …… ten years.
questions.explanationAr: for + مدة (ten years) مع have known.

questions.text: An earthquake happened while I …… . in my office.
questions.explanationAr: while + الماضي المستمر was working.

questions.text: I usually …… before bedtime.
questions.explanationAr: usually تدل على المضارع البسيط read.

questions.text: My doctor told me that I should …… . more vegetables.
questions.explanationAr: بعد should فعل مجرد: eat.

questions.text: Mona and I …… up at my house tomorrow.
questions.explanationAr: خطة مستقبلية مرتبة: are going to meet.

questions.text: 1'm so …… I'm going to Australia next week.
questions.explanationAr: الشعور بالشخص يوصف بصفة تنتهي بـ ed: excited.

questions.text: Bob enjoys …… games on his PC.
questions.explanationAr: بعد enjoy يأتي الفعل بـ ing: playing.

questions.text: Anna watched TV and then …… to a friend on Skype.
questions.explanationAr: معطوف على watched الماضي: spoke.

questions.text: Paul is a bad roommate. While I clean the apartment on the weekends, he just …… . videogames.
questions.explanationAr: عادة متكررة متقابلة مع while: plays.

questions.text: His breathing problems …… .by smoking.
questions.explanationAr: المشاكل تسببها (مجهول) في الماضي: were caused.

questions.text: Alex …… . in the face by his little brother.
questions.explanationAr: by + الفاعل دليل المجهول في الماضي: was kicked.

questions.text: My friend got a good job after …… from university last year.
questions.explanationAr: بعد حرف الجر after يأتي الفعل بـ ing: graduating.

questions.text: If I …… . a bird, I would fly far away from this cold weather.
questions.explanationAr: النوع الثاني: If I were a bird.

questions.text: We …… football three days ago.

passages.body: For centuries, camels have played a central role in Arabian life. Known as the "ships of the desert," they carried travelers and goods across long distances where no other animal could survive. A camel is perfectly designed for desert life: it can drink up to 100 liters of water in just ten minutes and then travel for two weeks without drinking again. Its wide feet stop it from sinking into the soft sand. Today, modern transport has replaced camels on most journeys, but they remain a proud symbol of heritage. Camel racing festivals attract thousands of visitors every year, and a prize-winning camel can sell for millions of riyals.

Many high school students stay up late using their phones or studying, then wake up early for school. Doctors say this habit is more harmful than most teenagers realize. Studies show that teenagers need eight to ten hours of sleep every night, but most get far less. A lack of sleep weakens concentration and memory, which makes learning much harder. In one experiment, students who slept well before an exam scored higher than students who stayed awake all night studying. Experts recommend putting phones away at least one hour before bed, because the blue light from screens delays the brain's natural sleep signals.

According to an old story, coffee was first discovered in Ethiopia by a goat herder named Kaldi, who noticed his goats dancing with energy after eating red berries from a certain tree. From Ethiopia, coffee traveled to Yemen, where people first brewed it as a hot drink to stay awake during long nights of prayer. By the sixteenth century, coffee houses had opened in Makkah, Cairo, and Istanbul, becoming popular places to meet and talk. Today, coffee is one of the most consumed drinks in the world. In Saudi Arabia, Arabic coffee flavored with cardamom is served to guests as a symbol of generosity and hospitality.

The Riyadh Metro is one of the largest urban transport projects ever built. Its six lines cover 176 kilometers and connect 85 stations across the capital. The project has two main goals: reducing traffic congestion on the city's crowded roads and cutting air pollution from cars. The trains are fully automatic and driverless, controlled by a central computer system. During rush hours, a train arrives at each station every few minutes, so passengers rarely wait long. City officials expect that hundreds of thousands of residents will gradually leave their cars at home and choose the metro for their daily trips to work and school.

Honey bees are among the most important insects on Earth, and not because of the honey they make. As bees fly from flower to flower collecting nectar, they carry pollen between plants, which allows the plants to produce fruits and seeds. Scientists estimate that about one third of the food humans eat depends on this process, called pollination. Unfortunately, bee numbers are falling in many countries because of chemical pesticides and the loss of wild flowers. Experts warn that protecting bees is protecting our own food supply. They encourage people to plant flowers in their gardens and to avoid spraying harmful chemicals.

In the year 2000, people spent $3.2 trillion dollars on travel. In 2005, they spent $3.4 trillion. In 2016, they will probably spend about $4.2 trillion. What is the most popular country that people go to? France is the most popular: 62.4 million people went to France in 2006. The United States is the second most popular country to visit: 46.3 million people went there in 2006.Spain was third, with 41.3 million visitors. Italy and Britain came next, and China was sixth.

Who travels? Europeans and some Asians travel to other countries the most. But Americans spend the most money in other countries. In 2006, Americans spent 52.6 billion in other countries. Germans were next: they spent $49.8 billion in other countries. Japanese were third: they spent $37.0 billion.

Where do the big spenders go? In 2006, Americans went mostly to Mexico 206) and Canada 136), but they also went to Europe and the Caribbean. Germans went mostly to other countries in Europe, but about 26 of them came to the United States. Japanese recycling travelers went all over the world: The United States, Europe, and Asia.

Piri Reis was a great commander in the Ottoman Turkish navy. He is best known, however, as the author of a famous book on navigation The Science of Ships and Sea Travel. His world maps are even more famous, and he is recognized today for his important contributions to geography

In 1525, he presented a copy of his book, Kitab-Al-Bahrye to Sultan Suleiman, the Turkish ruler. It gives detailed information on navigation and contains charts describing in great detail the important ports and cities of the Mediterranean Sea.

Although he was not an explorer like Christopher Columbus, Piri was an expert cartographer. He used a map of Columbus, as well as other older Arab, Chinese, Indian, Spanish and Greek maps, to create the most accurate map of the known world of that time. A small part of one of Piri's first world maps was discovered in 1929 at the Topkapi

Palace in Istanbul. It was drawn in 1513 on gazelle skin. Copies of Piri's book and maps can be found in many libraries and museums around the world. including the Topkapi Palace, the British Museum in London, and the National Library of France in Paris.
